params.name: Crime and Punishment
params.description:
On Feb 18, 1866 AD, Dostoevsky's Crime and Punishment was published.
Crime and Punishment is a novel by Fyodor Dostoevsky. Crime and Punishment follows the mental anguish and moral dilemmas of Rodion Raskolnikov, an impoverished student in Saint Petersburg who planned to kill an unscrupulous pawnbroker, an old woman who stored money and valuable objects in her flat. Once the deed was done, he found himself racked with confusion, paranoia, and disgust. After struggling with guilt and horror, h …
